_comment: MCP server registration for GitHub Copilot agent mode (VS Code / IntelliJ)
and any other MCP client. Each entry declares one server that the client
will spawn over stdio. The harness exposes its tool surface (filesystem,
bash, etc.) under the same permission policy as the standalone CLI.
2. In VS Code: Copilot will auto-discover this file.
3. In IntelliJ: configure GitHub Copilot to read this file, OR copy
the entries below into the IDE-level MCP settings.
and check that `tools/list` returns the expected tools.

agent-harness-dev.description: Local agent-harness exposing filesystem & sandboxed bash tools for the current workspace, dev profile (ask before mutations).

agent-harness-prod-ro.description: Read-only ops profile. Use this when investigating production from inside the IDE — no mutations possible.

agent-harness-ops.description: Full ops investigation profile with Dynatrace, Kubernetes (locked context), runbook RAG and Concourse. Read-only by construction.
